schema.description: Array of touchpoint configuration objects. Each entry defines offer screen parameters for one or more touchpoints. The system finds the first entry matching the requested touchpoint name (via name or names); if none matches, it falls back to the entry with name "default".

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint name strings this configuration applies to. Checked via list containment if the single name field does not match. Allows one configuration to serve multiple touchpoints.

name.description: Single touchpoint name string this configuration applies to. Matched via exact equality against the requested touchpoint. Use "default" for the fallback configuration that applies when no other touchpoint matches.

info.description: Array of offer parameter objects for this touchpoint. Each entry defines an offer screen configuration with its launch conditions. Entries are evaluated in order; the first one whose launch_logic conditions pass is used. If this array is empty or null, the touchpoint state is FAILURE and no offer UI is shown.

thank_you_popup.description: String identifier for the thank-you popup to display after the offer action. Mapped to OfferScreenParam.thankYouPopup and passed downstream. Can be any string value; defaults to empty string when null.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch condition objects. Each object defines a set of conditions that must all be satisfied (ANDed) for the offer to be shown. The array entries are evaluated in order and ORed—the first passing set wins. If this array is empty or null, the offer is shown unconditionally.

should_replace_with_ad.description: Whether the offer should be replaced with an interstitial ad. When true, the system checks if an interstitial ad can be shown for the touchpoint via AdParamsRepo.canShowInterstitialAd(); if the ad cannot be shown, the offer is blocked. Defaults to false when null.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: Whether the offer should be replaced with a rewarded ad in the credits flow. When true, the system checks if a rewarded ad can be shown via AdParamsRepo.canShowRewardedAd() with the credits flow flag enabled; if the ad cannot be shown, the offer is blocked. Defaults to false when null.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation required for this offer to be shown (inclusive lower bound). Checked against the number of days since the app was first used. Set to -1 or omit to disable the minimum check. Both install_day_min and install_day_max set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of editor-done actions required for this offer to be shown (inclusive lower bound). Checked against the editor done counter from SharedPreferences. Set to -1 or omit to disable the minimum check. Both editor_done_min and editor_done_max set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

app_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the app session count range. The offer is shown only when the app session count is less than this value and >= app_session_start. Set to -1 or omit to have no upper bound. Both app_session_start and app_session_end set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

editor_done_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the editor-done count range. The offer is shown only when the editor done count is less than this value and >= editor_done_min. Set to -1 or omit to have no upper bound. Both editor_done_min and editor_done_max set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum offer-specific session count for this touchpoint+screens combination (inclusive lower bound). Tracked in-memory per app session and resets on app restart. The offer is shown only when the session count is within [session_limit_start, session_limit_end). Set to -1 or omit to disable. Both set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package ID strings. When non-empty, the user must have had a subscription for at least one of these packages in their purchase history for the offer to be shown. When empty or null, this condition is skipped.

user_had_subscription.description: Whether the user must have had any prior subscription. When true, the offer is shown only if the user has subscription purchase history. When false, shown only if the user has never had a subscription. When null, this condition is skipped.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: Whether the offer should be replaced with a reward interstitial ad. When true, the system checks if an interstitial ad can be shown via AdParamsRepo.canShowInterstitialAd() with the minimum show interval check skipped; if the ad cannot be shown, the offer is blocked. Defaults to false when null.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key-based session count (inclusive lower bound). Key sessions are persisted across app restarts via SharedPreferences using the session_key. The offer is shown only when the key session count is within [key_session_start, key_session_end). This check is skipped if session_key is empty. Set to -1 or omit to disable. Both set to -1 disables this condition.

install_day_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the install days range. The offer is shown only when the number of days since app installation is less than this value and >= install_day_min. Set to -1 or omit to have no upper bound. Both install_day_min and install_day_max set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

is_ai_credit.description: Whether the offer should be shown only during or outside the AI credit flow. When true, the offer is shown only if the user is currently in the AI credit flow (CreditsTransactionUseCase.isCreditFlow() returns true). When false, shown only if the user is not in the AI credit flow. When null, this condition is skipped.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier string for the offer screen (newer field name variant without underscore between touch and point). Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present. Mapped to OfferLaunchLogicParams.offerScreenTouchPoint for downstream use.

repeat_key_session.description: Key session repeat interval for periodic offer display. When not -1 and session_key is non-empty, the offer is shown only when (keySessionCount + 1) modulo (repeat_key_session + 1) equals 0, creating a periodic display pattern based on the persisted key session counter. Set to -1 or omit to disable repeat key session logic.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage required for this offer to be shown (inclusive lower bound). Checked against the cached storage usage percentage from StorageUsageRepository. Set to -1 or omit to disable. Both storage_min_percent and storage_max_percent set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

is_store_available.description: Whether the Google Play Store must be available as an active payment type. When true, the offer is shown only if PaymentServiceType.Google is among the active payment types. When false, the offer is shown only if Google Play billing is not available. Defaults to true when null.

key_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the key-based session count range. The offer is shown only when the persisted key session count is less than this value and >= key_session_start. This check is skipped if session_key is empty. Set to -1 or omit to have no upper bound. Both set to -1 disables this condition.

repeat_session.description: App session repeat interval for periodic offer display. When not -1, the offer is shown only when the app session count modulo repeat_session equals 0, creating a periodic display pattern. Set to -1 or omit to disable repeat session logic.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier string for the offer screen (with underscore between touch and point). Used as a fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is not present. Mapped to OfferLaunchLogicParams.offerScreenTouchPoint for downstream use.

restricted_packages.description: Array of restricted package objects. When non-empty, all entries must pass the user eligibility check via SubscriptionInfoUseCase.isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer(packageId, offerId). If any entry fails the eligibility check, the offer is blocked. When null or empty, this condition is skipped.

package_id.description: Subscription package identifier string used to check user eligibility for a promotional offer via SubscriptionInfoUseCase.isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer(). Defaults to empty string when null.

offer_id.description: Promotional offer identifier string used together with package_id to check user eligibility via SubscriptionInfoUseCase.isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer(). Defaults to empty string when null.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type strings the user must currently have for this offer to be shown. If the user is subscribed, their current plan tier type value must be in this list. If the user is not subscribed, this list must contain "free". When empty or null, this condition is skipped and the offer is shown regardless of tier type.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count required for this offer to be shown (inclusive lower bound). Checked against the total app session count from SharedPreferences. Set to -1 or omit to disable the minimum check. Both app_session_start and app_session_end set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. The daily counter resets after 24 hours. Set to -1 or omit for unlimited daily displays.

should_replace_with_reward.description: Whether the offer should be replaced with a rewarded ad. When true, the system checks if a rewarded ad can be shown for the touchpoint via AdParamsRepo.canShowRewardedAd(); if the ad cannot be shown, the offer is blocked. Defaults to false when null.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: Whether the offer should be skipped during the one-day-pass cooldown period. When true, the offer is blocked if OneDayPassConfigRepo.isCooldownPeriodPassed() returns false (meaning the cooldown is still active). When false or null, the cooldown state is ignored and the offer can be shown regardless.

session_limit_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the offer-specific session count range. The offer is shown only when the in-memory session count is less than this value and >= session_limit_start. Set to -1 or omit to have no upper bound. Both session_limit_start and session_limit_end set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

storage_max_percent.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the storage usage percentage range. The offer is shown only when the cached storage usage percentage is less than this value and >= storage_min_percent. Set to -1 or omit to have no upper bound. Both storage_min_percent and storage_max_percent set to -1 disables this condition entirely.

offer_variant.description: String identifier for the offer screen variant. Mapped to OfferScreenParam.offerVariant and passed downstream. Can be any string value; defaults to empty string when null.

screens.description: List of screen name strings that define which offer screens to display. Also used to construct session tracking keys by joining screen names with dots (e.g., touchPoint.screen1.screen2). When null, defaults to an empty list, which results in a FAILURE state since no offer screen parameters are configured.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier string for the offer screen (newer field name variant without underscore between touch and point). Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present. Mapped to OfferScreenParam.offerScreenTouchPoint for downstream use.

session_key.description: Persistent session tracking key string. When non-empty, used to persist and retrieve session counts across app restarts via SharedPreferences. Enables the key_session_start, key_session_end, and repeat_key_session conditions in launch_logic. When empty or null, key-session-based conditions are skipped.

is_one_time_offer.description: Whether this offer is a one-time purchase offer. When true, the offer is flagged as a one-time purchase in OneTimePurchaseDetails.isOfferOneTime, affecting how the purchase flow is handled. Defaults to false when null.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier string for the offer screen (with underscore between touch and point). Used as a fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is not present. Mapped to OfferScreenParam.offerScreenTouchPoint for downstream use.

all_files.role: Determines whether a manageable offer screen should be shown based on launch logic, limits, subscription state, and ad configuration.
Interface defining getOfferName and incrementCounts operations for manageable offer screen resolution.
Interface defining offer screen resolution by touch point, session counting, and app session tracking.
Fetches OfferShowLogicApiModel from remote settings, delegates mapping to ManageableOffersMapper, and manages session/daily counters.
Maps OfferShowLogicApiModel API response into OfferScreenLaunchEntity domain model with launch logic params.
@FeatureStart API model deserialized from remote settings key offer_screen_show_logic_sf containing touchpoint offer configurations.
Domain entity file containing OfferScreenParam, OfferScreenLaunchEntity, OfferScreenParamEntity, OfferScreenState, OfferLaunchLogicParams, and RestrictedPackagesEntity.
Input parameter data class carrying touchPoint, forceShow flag, and tool usage info for offer resolution.
Sealed interface defining payment service types (Google, Fake, Web) used in Play Store availability checks.
Provides cached storage usage percentage used in storage-based offer launch logic range checks.
Provides user subscription state, purchase history, active payment types, and package details.
Tracks whether a fullscreen offer is currently showing to prevent concurrent offer displays.
Checks interstitial and rewarded ad availability for ad-replacement offer logic flows.
Provides one-day pass cooldown period status used to skip offers during cooldown.
Determines if the user is in a credit-based flow to conditionally filter offers flagged as credit-only.
Awaits ongoing PA guard subscription access requests before resolving offer eligibility.
Checks user eligibility for promotional offers used in restricted packages validation.
Data class representing purchase history entries used in had-subscription eligibility checks.
Entity carrying cooldown period and visual clue text for one-day pass configuration.
Entity defining cooldown length and without-trial days count for one-day pass period calculations.
Main DI module binding SubscriptionManageableOffersUseCase, SubscriptionManageableOffersRepo, ManageableOffersMapper, and AdParamsRepo.
DI module binding SubscriptionRepo and SubscriptionInfoUseCase implementations.
DI module binding SubscriptionAccessRepo implementation.
DI module binding OneDayPassConfigRepo implementation.

@FeatureStart API model deserialized from remote settings key offer_screen_show_logic_sf, containing disabled touchpoints and per-touchpoint offer configurations.
Provides cached storage usage percentage used to evaluate storage-based offer launch logic range checks.
Provides user subscription state, purchase history, active payment types, and package details used in multiple offer eligibility checks.
Tracks whether a fullscreen offer is currently showing to prevent concurrent offer displays.
